arts.sum: Everton boss Sean Dyche says his side's performance was "very strong" as the Toffees ended a five-game winless Premier League run by thrashing Wolves.

arts.ttl: Wolves 'nowhere near good enough' at Everton - O'Neil
arts.sum: Under-pressure Wolves boss Gary O'Neil admits his side were "nowhere near good enough" as they conceded "basic" goals in a heavy defeat at Everton.

arts.ttl: The four other players to score two own goals in one PL match after Dawson nets twice in Everton 4-0 Wolves
What Armando Broja did at full-time speaks volumes as Everton unleash double menace
arts.sum: The Joe Thomas verdict as Sean Dyche and Everton ease the pressure they had put themselves under with an excellent 4-0 win at home to Wolves

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche and Everton deliver as three brutal chants sum up night
arts.sum: Chris Beesley's on-the-whistle analysis after Everton record a vital 4-0 Premier League victory at home to Wolves

arts.ttl: Everton find scoring touch to thrash Wolves and pile pressure on Gary O’Neil
arts.sum: The Premier League’s joint-lowest scorers suddenly found their fortunes had changed.

arts.ttl: Wolves slump to heavy defeat as Everton score FOUR at home
arts.sum: Highlights from the match between Everton and Wolves in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Everton player ratings as Ashley Young and two others superb in huge Wolves win
arts.sum: Everton player ratings after the impressive and much-needed 4-0 Premier League win at home to Wolves

When another delivery wasn’t dealt with on 33 minutes, Orel Mangala lashed home the second for the Toffees. Instead, Everton made it four, with Dawson credited with a second own goal from yet another set piece which Wolves couldn’t handle, put in by McNeil.

arts.ttl: Everton find scoring touch to hammer Wolves and pile pressure on Gary O’Neil
arts.sum: The Premier League’s joint-lowest scorers suddenly found their fortunes had changed.
